prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily adjusted close prices for LOW from the past 2 years were used to estimate an annualized drift (mu=0.0526) and annualized volatility (sigma=0.2079). The point estimate for 18 days represents the mean of the predicted log-normal price distribution. Confidence intervals are derived from the same log-normal distribution, reflecting the likely range of prices based on the estimated volatility over the 18-day period. This model assumes historical trends and volatility will continue and does not account for unforeseen market events.
